in_scope: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) with speaker diarization
Verbatim transcript generation with per-speaker timestamps
Meeting protocol generation: participants list, discussion topics, decisions, action items with assignees and deadlines
Download / export of both artifacts by the user
Markdown protocol format with in-app rendered view component
In-app editing of the protocol (markdown editor)
PDF export of the protocol (via export script)
success_criteria: User can upload a 300-500 MB video and receive a verbatim speaker-attributed transcript
User can receive a structured meeting protocol with participants, topics, decisions, and action items
Both artifacts are produced without manual intervention after upload
Timestamps in transcript are accurate to the second
properties.name: Transcrib
out_of_scope: Real-time / live meeting transcription (batch processing only)
User authentication and access management (no multi-tenancy assumed)
Integration with calendar or meeting platforms (e.g. Zoom, Teams)
Sending or distributing the protocol to participants automatically
constraints: Input files up to 300-500 MB must be handled without timeout
Tech stack is TBD - no stack-specific constraints defined yet
Processing may be asynchronous due to large file sizes and ASR latency
No processing-time SLA: async, best effort
Protocol stored and edited as Markdown; PDF is export-only
assumptions: [assumption] A single user role (Meeting Participant) covers the primary stakeholder
[assumption] An external ASR/diarization engine is required; vendor/model TBD
[assumption] An LLM-based service is required for protocol generation; provider TBD
[assumption] A file/object storage service is required to hold large video files; service TBD
[assumption] One video at a time per user session; queue/parallelism design TBD
goals: Transcribe audio from large meeting video files (300-500 MB) with speaker diarization
Produce a verbatim, speaker-attributed transcript with minute/second timestamps
Generate a structured meeting protocol: participants, topics discussed, decisions made, action items with assignees and deadlines
